title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2023

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day by 0.07%.the main contract I2401 closed 723. some traders quotation is still stronger.steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
